x-enumeration-literals.name: Charge Bearer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party(ies) liable for a charge associated with the transfer of cash. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Charge Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that takes the transaction charges or to which the transaction charges are due. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Charge Recipient
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party entitled to the amount of money resulting from a charge. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Charge Account Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Agent that services a charge account. (ISO20022)
